name: python-docstring-generator
description: Automatically generate and update Python docstrings in Google, NumPy, or Sphinx format..

commands.title: Python: Update All Docstrings in File
Python: Convert All Docstrings in File

enumDescriptions: Auto-detect from pyproject.toml; falls back to Google
docstringGenerator.format.description: Docstring format. If empty, auto-detected from pyproject.toml; falls back to Google.

docstringGenerator.trigger.codeAction.description: Show the lightbulb code action on undocumented functions.

docstringGenerator.onSave.enable.description: Generate docstrings for all undocumented functions and classes on file save.

docstringGenerator.includeTypesFromAnnot.description: Include type info in the docstring when a type annotation is present in the signature.

docstringGenerator.includeDefaults.description: Append 'Defaults to X.' in the parameter description when a default value is present.

docstringGenerator.includeExtendedSummar.description: Include an extended summary placeholder section after the one-line summary.

docstringGenerator.returns.skipNone.description: Suppress the Returns section when the return annotation is None or absent.

docstringGenerator.returns.requireAnnota.description: Only emit a Returns section when a return annotation is present.

docstringGenerator.detectGenerators.description: Emit Yields instead of Returns for generator functions.

docstringGenerator.raises.useSubprocess.description: Use the workspace Python interpreter for precise raises analysis.

docstringGenerator.raises.useSimpleScan.description: Fall back to tree-sitter token scanning for raises when no interpreter is available.

docstringGenerator.mergeInitParams.description: Hoist __init__ parameters into the class-level docstring.

docstringGenerator.includeClassAttribute.description: Include an Attributes section for class-level annotated assignments and dataclass fields.

docstringGenerator.update.removeStalePar.description: Remove parameter entries no longer present in the signature.

docstringGenerator.placeholders.summary.description: Placeholder text for the summary line.

docstringGenerator.placeholders.descript.description: Placeholder text for parameter and return descriptions.

docstringGenerator.pythonPath.description: Explicit path to the Python interpreter. If empty, uses the interpreter selected by the Python extension.

docstringGenerator.ai.generateSummary.description: Use the VS Code LM API to generate the summary line.

docstringGenerator.ai.generateParamDescr.description: Use the VS Code LM API to generate parameter descriptions.

docstringGenerator.ai.generateReturnDesc.description: Use the VS Code LM API to generate the return description.

docstringGenerator.ai.includeBodyContext.description: Send the function body to the LM for richer context.

docstringGenerator.ai.maxBodyTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens from the function body to include in the LM prompt.

docstringGenerator.ai.modelFamily.description: Pin to a specific LM model family (e.g., 'claude-haiku', 'gpt-4o'). If empty, the best available model is selected automatically.
